s: In 2012, Tyler Moore suited up for WSN as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.263, OPS 0.840, HR 10, RBI 29, WAR 0.700.

Changed teams after the previous season (WSN -> MIA).
In 2017, Tyler Moore suited up for MIA as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.230, OPS 0.668, HR 6, RBI 30, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined MIA.
